Processing

Home»Processing

Ahmad Textile coordinates fabric processing — dyeing, finishing and printing — across a trusted network of processing units, matched to each order's specification and quality requirement.

Capability

Finishes

Sanforizing, resin finishing, wrinkle-free treatment, flame retardant, water & oil repellent, soil release, and antimicrobial finishes — matched to the end use of the fabric.

Dyeing

Reactive, VAT, sulphur and pigment dyeing for cotton fabrics; disperse combined with reactive or pigment dyeing for polyester-blended qualities.

Printing

Rotary and panel printing coordinated through our partner mills, from single-color placements to multi-color repeat patterns.

Every processing lot is checked at each stage of dyeing, printing and finishing before it's approved for dispatch — matched against the buyer's approved lab dip or strike-off sample for shade, GSM and colorfastness.
